name: Gourmet Gusto
description: Gourmet Gusto is a chef-themed variant of the Air Trap Master Gusto, created exclusively for the mobile game Skylanders: Lost Islands.
biography: Gourmet Gusto appeared in May 2015 as a special addition to the Lost Islands. Trading his usual hunting gear for a chef's hat and apron, he brings a culinary flair to the Skylands, proving that even a Trap Master can appreciate the finer points of gourmet cooking.
quote: Gourmet Gusto is bringing some flavor to the Lost Islands!
personality: Gourmet Gusto is a jovial and enthusiastic chef. He shares the boisterous and friendly nature of the original Gusto, but redirected toward his passion for food and culinary arts.

content: Gourmet Gusto is bringing some flavor to the Lost Islands!

trivia: Gourmet Gusto is the last Skylander exclusive to the mobile game Skylanders: Lost Islands.
gameplay: In Skylanders: Lost Islands, Gourmet Gusto functions as a playable hero who can be assigned to various tasks on the player's islands to earn gold and experience. Like other Trap Masters in the game, he provides specific elemental bonuses.
